response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and technical leadership, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His exposure to GenAI, agentic workflows, and MCP servers appears limited to his most recent role, and he lacks required experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with a strong technical leadership and consulting background.
Demonstrated expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and modern cloud/microservices architectures.
Recent, relevant hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict minimum requirement of 8 years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
Lacks explicit experience with Python, Vector Databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
No demonstrated history of building evaluation pipelines or observability frameworks specifically for AI-system quality assurance.
